blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,772 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
